# Dr. Niranjan Ghag — Orthopaedic Surgeon, Thane

> Orthopaedic surgeon in Thane West, Maharashtra, specialising in robotic-assisted
> hip & knee replacement, foot & ankle surgery, sports injuries & arthroscopy, and
> complex trauma & fracture management. Consultations in English, Marathi and Hindi.

Dr. Niranjan Ghag (alternate name: Dr. Niranjan Sunil Ghag) consults at two Thane West
locations and focuses on tissue-sparing robotic techniques for faster recovery, with an
emphasis on accurate early diagnosis and the simplest effective treatment.

## Contact & locations
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 90760 79000
- Clinic 1: Joshi's Neurotrauma Centre, Khopat, Thane West (opposite Viviana Mall)
- Clinic 2: Sahayogi Hospital LLP, Naupada, Thane West
- Languages: English, Marathi, Hindi

## Specialties
- [Robotic Joint Replacement (Hip & Knee)](https://drniranjanghag.com/specialties/joint-replacement)
- [Foot & Ankle Surgery](https://drniranjanghag.com/specialties/foot-ankle)
- [Sports Injuries & Arthroscopy](https://drniranjanghag.com/specialties/sports-arthroscopy)
- [Trauma & Fracture Management](https://drniranjanghag.com/specialties/trauma-fracture)
